title: Developer Network
text:
APIs and Documentation
Explore our web services and API documentation to access and use data in these renewable energy categories. To use our APIs, sign up for an API key.
Buildings
Services related to energy efficiency and the use of renewable technologies in residential and commercial buildings.
Climate
Access data services that provide access to climate resource data.
Electricity
Services associated with electricity costs, generation, transmission, delivery, and monitoring.
Energy Optimization
Tools and models to optimize renewable energy, conventional generation, and energy storage systems for buildings, campuses, communities, and microgrids.
Solar
Access data and analysis services that provide access to solar resource data and NLR models.
Transportation
Use this web service documentation to access data about alternative transportation technologies.
Wave
Access data and analysis services that provide access to wave resource data and NLR models.
Wind
Access data and analysis services that provide access to wind resource data and NLR models.
General Information
